title: Do You Want to Die in Indio?
original_title: Do You Want to Die in Indio?
overview: When a budding romance falls apart, and a scholarship to USC gets yanked out from under him, 17-year-old Salvi hits the mean streets of Palm Springs and gets swept up into an incendiary weekend of partying, gun violence and sexual ambiguity.
